texto: Girls who like each other have a different energy. More intense. Furtive. They're part of a secret world. They speak in code, like spies. Everything has a hidden meaning.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Leah Reader: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Girls who like each other have a different energy. More intense. Furtive. They're part of a secre…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, lgbt, lgbtq pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de lgbtq e love.

texto: You should love something while you have it, love it fully and without reservation, even if you know you'll lost it someday. We lose everything. If you're trying to avoid loss, there's no point in taking another breath, or letting your heart beat one more time. It all ends. That's all life is. Breathing in, breathing out. The space between two breaths.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Leah Reader sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “You should love something while you have it, love it fully and without reservation, even if you k…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a amor, vida, loss, útil em momentos de termino e luto.

If you're trying to avoid loss, there's no point in taking another breath, or letting your heart beat one more time. It all ends. That's all life is. Breathing in, breathing out.
